action.reasoning: Observation: exprate stuck ~0.07 (best 0.0717), debug shows partial structure (frac/sqrt/eqs) but symbol/sub/superscript errors, overgeneration, incomplete nums; last run failed on deprecated 'verbose' in scheduler + truncated model.py (incomplete generate/EOS logic) and train.py (incomplete loop/loss/metrics). Loss curves show steady decline to ~1.0. Analysis: Core ResNet50 spatial features + Bahdanau attention + aspect-preserving resize(256x1664) is appropriate for HMER (basic learning evident); root causes are code truncation from incremental edits, scheduler API change in torch, minor loss alignment, and greedy decode + exposure bias limiting exact matches. Decision: Supply fully complete non-truncated model.py (add MathExprRecognizer wrapper, fully implement per-sample EOS-stopping generate excluding sos/eos, consistent inits/forward), complete train.py (remove verbose, fix shifted-target CE loss, add grad_clip, full per-batch/epoch jsonl logging, resume best.pt, 25 epochs, bs=12, AdamW+plateau on val_exprate, aug); keep predict/debug. Run train+debug to fix bugs and improve (>0.08 expected), then submit_eval on best.pt. This establishes clean baseline before further opts like beam search or backbone swap.
